<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Marianne C. Macarine — Portfolio</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,700;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root {
    --cream: #f9f5ef;
    --warm-white: #fdf9f4;
    --blush: #e8c4b8;
    --rose: #c9726b;
    --deep-rose: #9e4a4a;
    --espresso: #2d1f1f;
    --mocha: #5c3d3d;
    --sage: #8aaa8c;
    --gold: #c9a96e;
    --light-blush: #f5e8e3;
  }

  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

  body {
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    background: var(--cream);
    color: var(--espresso);
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  /* ── NAV ── */
  nav {
    position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100;
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    padding: 1.2rem 4rem;
    background: rgba(249,245,239,0.85);
    backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,114,107,0.15);
  }
  .nav-logo {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em;
    color: var(--deep-rose);
  }
  .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 2.2rem; list-style: none; }
  .nav-links a {
    font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--mocha); text-decoration: none;
    position: relative; transition: color 0.3s;
  }
  .nav-links a::after {
    content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -3px; left: 0;
    width: 0; height: 1px; background: var(--rose);
    transition: width 0.3s ease;
  }
  .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--rose); }
  .nav-links a:hover::after { width: 100%; }

  /* ── HERO ── */
  #home {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 8rem 4rem 4rem;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hero-bg-shape {
    position: absolute; right: -80px; top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    width: 600px; height: 600px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, var(--blush) 0%, transparent 70%);
    opacity: 0.4; pointer-events: none;
  }
  .hero-decor {
    position: absolute; top: 15%; left: 5%;
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 14rem; font-weight: 300; color: rgba(201,114,107,0.06);
    line-height: 1; pointer-events: none; user-select: none;
    animation: fadeFloat 6s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes fadeFloat {
    0%,100% { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 0.4; }
    50% { transform: translateY(-12px); opacity: 0.7; }
  }
  .hero-text { position: relative; z-index: 2; }
  .hero-eyebrow {
    font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.22em;
    text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--rose);
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem; opacity: 0;
    animation: slideUp 0.8s ease 0.2s forwards;
  }
  .hero-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: clamp(3rem, 5vw, 5.5rem);
    line-height: 1.05; font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--espresso);
    opacity: 0; animation: slideUp 0.8s ease 0.4s forwards;
  }
  .hero-name em {
    font-style: italic; color: var(--rose);
  }
  .hero-tagline {
    margin-top: 1.6rem;
    font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.8; font-weight: 300;
    color: var(--mocha); max-width: 480px;
    opacity: 0; animation: slideUp 0.8s ease 0.6s forwards;
  }
  .hero-cta {
    margin-top: 2.4rem; display: flex; gap: 1rem; align-items: center;
    opacity: 0; animation: slideUp 0.8s ease 0.8s forwards;
  }
  .btn-primary {
    padding: 0.85rem 2.2rem;
    background: var(--deep-rose); color: #fff;
    border: none; border-radius: 50px;
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.3s ease; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(158,74,74,0.3);
  }
  .btn-primary:hover {
    background: var(--rose); transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(158,74,74,0.4);
  }
  .btn-outline {
    padding: 0.85rem 2.2rem;
    background: transparent; color: var(--deep-rose);
    border: 1.5px solid var(--deep-rose); border-radius: 50px;
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
  }
  .btn-outline:hover {
    background: var(--deep-rose); color: #fff; transform: translateY(-2px);
  }
  .hero-image-col {
    display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center;
    position: relative; z-index: 2;
    opacity: 0; animation: fadeIn 1s ease 1s forwards;
  }
  .avatar-frame {
    width: 340px; height: 420px; border-radius: 60% 40% 55% 45% / 50% 55% 45% 50%;
    background: linear-gradient(145deg, var(--blush), var(--light-blush));
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 9rem; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 30px 80px rgba(201,114,107,0.2),
                inset 0 0 0 3px rgba(201,114,107,0.15);
    animation: morphBlob 8s ease-in-out infinite;
  }
  @keyframes morphBlob {
    0%,100% { border-radius: 60% 40% 55% 45% / 50% 55% 45% 50%; }
    33% { border-radius: 45% 55% 45% 55% / 55% 45% 55% 45%; }
    66% { border-radius: 55% 45% 60% 40% / 45% 60% 40% 55%; }
  }
  .avatar-ring {
    position: absolute; inset: -16px;
    border: 2px dashed rgba(201,114,107,0.3);
    border-radius: 60% 40% 55% 45% / 50% 55% 45% 50%;
    animation: spin 20s linear infinite;
  }
  @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

  @keyframes slideUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }
  @keyframes fadeIn {
    from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; }
  }

  /* ── SECTIONS COMMON ── */
  section { padding: 6rem 4rem; }
  .section-label {
    font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.25em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--rose); font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 3.5vw, 3rem);
    font-weight: 700; color: var(--espresso); line-height: 1.15;
    margin-bottom: 3rem;
  }
  .section-title em { font-style: italic; color: var(--rose); }
  .divider {
    width: 60px; height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--rose), var(--gold));
    margin-bottom: 3rem; border-radius: 2px;
  }

  /* ── ABOUT ── */
  #about { background: var(--warm-white); }
  .about-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.2fr; gap: 5rem; align-items: start; }
  .about-info-card {
    background: var(--cream); border-radius: 24px;
    padding: 2.5rem; border: 1px solid rgba(201,114,107,0.12);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 30px rgba(201,114,107,0.07);
  }
  .info-row {
    display: flex; gap: 1rem; align-items: flex-start;
    padding: 0.9rem 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(201,114,107,0.1);
  }
  .info-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .info-label {
    font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--rose); font-weight: 500; min-width: 90px; padding-top: 2px;
  }
  .info-value { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--mocha); line-height: 1.5; }
  .about-text p {
    font-size: 0.98rem; line-height: 1.9; color: var(--mocha);
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem; font-weight: 300;
  }
  .about-badge {
    display: inline-block; padding: 0.5rem 1.2rem;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--blush), var(--light-blush));
    border-radius: 50px; font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--deep-rose);
    font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.06em; margin-top: 0.5rem;
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,114,107,0.2);
  }

  /* ── HOBBIES ── */
  #hobbies { background: var(--cream); }
  .hobbies-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4,1fr); gap: 1.5rem; }
  .hobby-card {
    background: var(--warm-white); border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 2.2rem 1.8rem; text-align: center;
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,114,107,0.1);
    box-shadow: 0 2px 20px rgba(201,114,107,0.06);
    transition: all 0.4s ease; cursor: default;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  .hobby-card::before {
    content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--blush), var(--light-blush));
    opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.4s ease;
  }
  .hobby-card:hover { transform: translateY(-8px); box-shadow: 0 16px 40px rgba(201,114,107,0.18); }
  .hobby-card:hover::before { opacity: 0.5; }
  .hobby-icon {
    font-size: 3rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; position: relative; z-index: 1;
    display: block;
  }
  .hobby-name {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--espresso);
    position: relative; z-index: 1;
  }
  .hobby-desc {
    font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--mocha); margin-top: 0.4rem;
    position: relative; z-index: 1; font-weight: 300;
  }

  /* ── SKILLS ── */
  #skills { background: var(--warm-white); }
  .skills-layout { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 4rem; align-items: start; }
  .skill-item { margin-bottom: 2.5rem; }
  .skill-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 0.7rem; }
  .skill-name {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--espresso);
  }
  .skill-pct { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--rose); font-weight: 500; }
  .skill-bar { height: 6px; background: rgba(201,114,107,0.15); border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; }
  .skill-fill {
    height: 100%; border-radius: 10px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--rose), var(--gold));
    width: 0; transition: width 1.4s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
  }
  .skills-side-text {
    padding-top: 1rem;
  }
  .skills-side-text p {
    font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: 1.9; color: var(--mocha);
    font-weight: 300; margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
  }
  .tech-tag {
    display: inline-block; padding: 0.4rem 1rem;
    background: var(--cream); border: 1px solid rgba(201,114,107,0.25);
    border-radius: 50px; font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--deep-rose);
    margin: 0.3rem; font-weight: 500;
  }

  /* ── CERTIFICATIONS ── */
  #certifications { background: var(--cream); }
  .cert-card {
    background: var(--warm-white); border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 2rem 2.5rem;
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,114,107,0.12);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 25px rgba(201,114,107,0.07);
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2rem;
    max-width: 680px;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
  }
  .cert-card:hover { transform: translateX(8px); box-shadow: 0 8px 35px rgba(201,114,107,0.14); }
  .cert-icon {
    width: 64px; height: 64px; border-radius: 16px; flex-shrink: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--blush), var(--light-blush));
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.8rem;
  }
  .cert-info h3 {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--espresso);
    margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
  }
  .cert-info p { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--mocha); font-weight: 300; }
  .cert-year {
    margin-left: auto; font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 300; color: rgba(201,114,107,0.3);
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  /* ── PROJECTS ── */
  #projects { background: var(--warm-white); }
  .projects-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 2rem; }
  .project-card {
    background: var(--cream); border-radius: 24px;
    padding: 2.5rem;
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,114,107,0.12);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 25px rgba(201,114,107,0.07);
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    transition: all 0.4s ease;
  }
  .project-card::after {
    content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 4px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--rose), var(--gold));
    transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left;
    transition: transform 0.4s ease;
  }
  .project-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(201,114,107,0.15); }
  .project-card:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); }
  .project-num {
    font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
    font-size: 3.5rem; font-weight: 300; color: rgba(201,114,107,0.12);
    line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .project-title {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--espresso);
    margin-bottom: 0.7rem; line-height: 1.3;
  }
  .project-desc { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--mocha); line-height: 1.7; font-weight: 300; margin-bottom: 1.2rem; }
  .project-category {
    font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--rose); font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  }
  .status-badge {
    display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem;
    padding: 0.35rem 0.9rem; border-radius: 50px;
    font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    background: rgba(138,170,140,0.15); color: var(--sage);
    border: 1px solid rgba(138,170,140,0.3);
  }
  .status-badge::before {
    content: ''; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--sage); display: inline-block;
  }

  /* ── CONTACT ── */
  #contact {
    background: var(--espresso);
    color: var(--cream);
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
  }
  #contact::before {
    content: ''; position: absolute; right: -100px; top: -100px;
    width: 500px; height: 500px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(201,114,107,0.15), transparent 60%);
    pointer-events: none;
  }
  #contact .section-label { color: var(--blush); }
  #contact .section-title { color: var(--cream); }
  #contact .section-title em { color: var(--blush); }
  .contact-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.2fr; gap: 5rem; align-items: center; }
  .contact-lead {
    font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.9; color: rgba(249,245,239,0.65);
    font-weight: 300;
  }
  .contact-items { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; }
  .contact-item {
    display: flex; gap: 1.4rem; align-items: center;
    padding: 1.4rem 1.8rem; border-radius: 16px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,114,107,0.2);
    transition: all 0.3s ease; text-decoration: none;
  }
  .contact-item:hover {
    background: rgba(201,114,107,0.12);
    border-color: rgba(201,114,107,0.4);
    transform: translateX(6px);
  }
  .contact-icon {
    width: 46px; height: 46px; border-radius: 12px; flex-shrink: 0;
    background: rgba(201,114,107,0.2);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 1.2rem;
  }
  .contact-detail h4 {
    font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--blush); margin-bottom: 0.25rem; font-weight: 500;
  }
  .contact-detail p { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--cream); font-weight: 300; }

  /* ── FOOTER ── */
  footer {
    background: #1a0f0f; text-align: center;
    padding: 2rem 4rem;
    font-size: 0.8rem; color: rgba(249,245,239,0.35);
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  }
  footer span { color: var(--rose); }

  /* ── SCROLL REVEAL ── */
  .reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); transition: all 0.7s ease; }
  .reveal.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }

  /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    nav { padding: 1rem 2rem; }
    .nav-links { gap: 1.2rem; }
    #home { grid-template-columns: 1fr; padding: 7rem 2rem 4rem; }
    .hero-image-col { display: none; }
    section { padding: 4rem 2rem; }
    .about-grid, .skills-layout, .contact-grid, .projects-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 2.5rem; }
    .hobbies-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .hero-decor { display: none; }
    .cert-year { display: none; }
  }

  /* About photos */
  .about-photos {
    display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 1.2rem;
    margin-top: 2.5rem;
  }
  .about-photo-frame {
    border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,114,107,0.15);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(201,114,107,0.1);
    position: relative;
    aspect-ratio: 3/4;
  }
  .about-photo-frame img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover;
    display: block; transition: transform 0.5s ease;
  }
  .about-photo-frame:hover img { transform: scale(1.04); }
  .photo-label {
    position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(45,31,31,0.85), transparent);
    color: var(--cream); font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 500;
    padding: 1.2rem 1rem 0.7rem; text-align: center;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  }

  /* Cert photo */
  .cert-image-wrapper {
    margin-top: 2rem; max-width: 680px;
    border-radius: 20px; overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid rgba(201,114,107,0.15);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(201,114,107,0.12);
  }
  .cert-photo {
    width: 100%; display: block;
    transition: transform 0.4s ease;
  }
  .cert-image-wrapper:hover .cert-photo { transform: scale(1.02); }

</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <div class="nav-logo">MCM</div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#home">Home</a></li>
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#hobbies">Hobbies</a></li>
    <li><a href="#skills">Skills</a></li>
    <li><a href="#certifications">Certifications</a></li>
    <li><a href="#projects">Projects</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- HERO / INTRO -->
<section id="home">
  <div class="hero-decor">M</div>
  <div class="hero-bg-shape"></div>
  <div class="hero-text">
    <p class="hero-eyebrow">✦ Portfolio</p>
    <h1 class="hero-name">Marianne<br><em>Macarine</em></h1>
    <p class="hero-tagline">A motivated and responsible student at Davao del Norte State College who is always willing to learn new things, take on challenges, and continuously improving herself in building real-world solutions with MySQL, Java, and modern technology.</p>
    <div class="hero-cta">
      <a href="#projects" class="btn-primary">View Projects</a>
      <a href="#contact" class="btn-outline">Get in Touch</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-image-col">
    <div class="avatar-frame">
      <div class="avatar-ring"></div>
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Marianne C. Macarine" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:inherit;position:relative;z-index:1;" />
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
  <p class="section-label reveal">02 — About Me</p>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">The person <em>behind the code</em></h2>
  <div class="about-grid">
    <div class="reveal">
      <div class="about-info-card">
        <div class="info-row">
          <span class="info-label">Full Name</span>
          <span class="info-value">Marianne Cervantes Macarine</span>
        </div>
        <div class="info-row">
          <span class="info-label">Age</span>
          <span class="info-value">19 years old</span>
        </div>
        <div class="info-row">
          <span class="info-label">School</span>
          <span class="info-value">Davao del Norte State College</span>
        </div>
        <div class="info-row">
          <span class="info-label">Course</span>
          <span class="info-value">Bachelor of Science in Information Systems (BSIS)</span>
        </div>
        <div class="info-row">
          <span class="info-label">Location</span>
          <span class="info-value">Brgy. San Francisco, Panabo City, Davao del Norte, Philippines</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="about-text reveal">
      <p>My name is Marianne C. Macarine. I am currently a Bachelor of Science in Information Systems (BSIS) student at Davao del Norte State College. Aside from being a student, I am also a student-athlete, which has taught me the importance of discipline, hard work, and time management.</p>
      <p>I enjoy learning about technology and information systems, especially how they can be used to solve problems and improve the way organizations operate.</p>
      <p>I hold a Computer System Servicing NCII certification, which I earned back in 2025 during my Senior High School years — a milestone that fueled my passion for IT and systems development.</p>
      <span class="about-badge">🏐 Student-Athlete &nbsp;|&nbsp; 💻 IS Student</span>
    </div>
  </div>

    <div class="about-photos reveal">
      <div class="about-photo-frame">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Marianne in DNSC uniform" />
        <span class="photo-label">Student-Athlete 🏐</span>
      </div>
      <div class="about-photo-frame">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Marianne playing volleyball" />
        <span class="photo-label">DNSC Sharks #14</span>
      </div>
    </div>
</section>

<!-- HOBBIES -->
<section id="hobbies">
  <p class="section-label reveal">03 — Hobbies</p>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">What I <em>love doing</em></h2>
  <div class="divider reveal"></div>
  <div class="hobbies-grid">
    <div class="hobby-card reveal">
      <span class="hobby-icon">💃</span>
      <div class="hobby-name">Dancing</div>
      <div class="hobby-desc">Expressing emotions through movement and rhythm</div>
    </div>
    <div class="hobby-card reveal">
      <span class="hobby-icon">🎬</span>
      <div class="hobby-name">Watching K-Dramas</div>
      <div class="hobby-desc">Immersing in compelling Korean stories & culture</div>
    </div>
    <div class="hobby-card reveal">
      <span class="hobby-icon">🏐</span>
      <div class="hobby-name">Volleyball</div>
      <div class="hobby-desc">Competing, staying active, and building teamwork</div>
    </div>
    <div class="hobby-card reveal">
      <span class="hobby-icon">🍜</span>
      <div class="hobby-name">Food Adventures</div>
      <div class="hobby-desc">Trying and enjoying all my favorite comfort foods</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SKILLS -->
<section id="skills">
  <p class="section-label reveal">04 — Skills</p>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">My <em>Technical Skills</em></h2>
  <div class="skills-layout">
    <div class="reveal">
      <div class="skill-item">
        <div class="skill-header">
          <span class="skill-name">Java</span>
          <span class="skill-pct">80%</span>
        </div>
        <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="80"></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="skill-item">
        <div class="skill-header">
          <span class="skill-name">MySQL</span>
          <span class="skill-pct">80%</span>
        </div>
        <div class="skill-bar"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="80"></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="skills-side-text reveal">
      <p>My technical foundation is built on Java and MySQL, which I've been applying in real-world academic projects. I'm continuously expanding my knowledge in modern technologies to build efficient, data-driven solutions.</p>
      <div>
        <span class="tech-tag">Java</span>
        <span class="tech-tag">MySQL</span>
        <span class="tech-tag">Database Design</span>
        <span class="tech-tag">Information Systems</span>
        <span class="tech-tag">Computer Servicing</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CERTIFICATIONS -->
<section id="certifications">
  <p class="section-label reveal">05 — Certifications</p>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">My <em>Achievements</em></h2>
  <div class="divider reveal"></div>
  <div class="reveal">
    <div class="cert-card">
      <div class="cert-icon">🏅</div>
      <div class="cert-info">
        <h3>Computer System Servicing NC II</h3>
        <p>Technical Education and Skills Development Authority (TESDA) &nbsp;·&nbsp; Senior High School</p>
      </div>
      <div class="cert-year">2025</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="cert-card reveal" style="margin-top:1.5rem; max-width:680px;">
    <div class="cert-icon">🏆</div>
    <div class="cert-info">
      <h3>1st Runner Up — Live MTV Spoof</h3>
      <p>ByteFest 3.0 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Institute of Computing Local Student Government, DNSC &nbsp;·&nbsp; Theme: "Digital Odyssey: Beyond the Known Frontier"</p>
    </div>
    <div class="cert-year">2026</div>
  </div>
  
  <div class="cert-image-wrapper reveal">
    <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Certificate of Recognition - ByteFest 3.0" class="cert-photo" />
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROJECTS -->
<section id="projects">
  <p class="section-label reveal">06 — Projects</p>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">What I've <em>Built</em></h2>
  <div class="projects-grid">
    <div class="project-card reveal">
      <div class="project-num">01</div>
      <div class="project-category">Fundamentals of IS — ISTP</div>
      <h3 class="project-title">Cafe Michii POS & Inventory Management System</h3>
      <p class="project-desc">A point-of-sale and inventory management system developed for Cafe Michii. Designed to streamline order processing, track stock levels, and improve operational efficiency for the café.</p>
      <span class="status-badge">Completed</span>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card reveal">
      <div class="project-num">02</div>
      <div class="project-category">Systems Development</div>
      <h3 class="project-title">Booking Management System for Casa la Perla Davao</h3>
      <p class="project-desc">A comprehensive booking management system developed for Casa la Perla Davao. Enables efficient management of reservations, availability tracking, and customer booking workflows.</p>
      <span class="status-badge">Completed</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section id="contact">
  <p class="section-label reveal">07 — Contact</p>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">Let's <em>Connect</em></h2>
  <div class="contact-grid">
    <div class="reveal">
      <p class="contact-lead">I'm always open to new opportunities, collaborations, and conversations. Whether you have a project in mind or just want to say hello — feel free to reach out!</p>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-items reveal">
      <a href="mailto:mariannemacarine@gmail.com" class="contact-item">
        <div class="contact-icon">✉️</div>
        <div class="contact-detail">
          <h4>Email</h4>
          <p>mariannemacarine@gmail.com</p>
        </div>
      </a>
      <a href="https://facebook.com" class="contact-item" target="_blank">
        <div class="contact-icon">👤</div>
        <div class="contact-detail">
          <h4>Facebook</h4>
          <p>Marianne Macarine</p>
        </div>
      </a>
      <a href="tel:09152204188" class="contact-item">
        <div class="contact-icon">📱</div>
        <div class="contact-detail">
          <h4>Contact Number</h4>
          <p>0915 220 4188</p>
        </div>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <p>© 2025 <span>Marianne C. Macarine</span> &nbsp;·&nbsp; Davao del Norte State College &nbsp;·&nbsp; BSIS Student</p>
</footer>

<script>
  // Scroll reveal
  const reveals = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach((entry, i) => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        setTimeout(() => entry.target.classList.add('visible'), i * 80);
        observer.unobserve(entry.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.12 });
  reveals.forEach(el => observer.observe(el));

  // Skill bars animate on scroll
  const skillFills = document.querySelectorAll('.skill-fill');
  const skillObserver = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        const w = entry.target.dataset.width;
        setTimeout(() => entry.target.style.width = w + '%', 300);
        skillObserver.unobserve(entry.target);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.3 });
  skillFills.forEach(el => skillObserver.observe(el));
</script>
</body>
</html>
